body:
![critical](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/critical.svg)

The Argon2id parameters used for password hashing are too weak and do not meet current security recommendations. OWASP recommends a minimum parallelism of 2, while the code uses 1. Additionally, while the memory size of 19MiB is the minimum recommended, a higher value would provide stronger protection against cracking attempts. I recommend increasing these parameters to more secure values to better protect user passwords.

```suggestion
  const hashedPassword = await argon2id({
    password,
    salt,
    parallelism: 2, // OWASP minimum recommendation
    iterations: 3, // Increased for better security
    memorySize: 65536, // 64MiB, a stronger value
    hashLength: 32,
    outputType: "encoded",
  });
```
